name: Extract title deed data and score risk factors with AI

parameters.content:
## 🏠 Title Deed Risk Scorer

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for title documents
2. Extracts grantor, grantee, property description, liens
3. AI evaluates chain of title gaps and risks
4. Generates risk score with explanatory notes
5. Logs findings to Google Sheets
6. Sends Slack alert with risk assessment

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for title documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Property | Grantor | Grantee | Recording Date | Liens | Encumbrances | Risk Score | Risk Factors | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Title companies
- Real estate attorneys
- Escrow officers

## 🔀 Parallel Processing

Extract and Risk Analysis run at the
same time from the same PDF

parameters.prompt: Extract title deed/document data as flat fields. documentType, recordingDate (YYYY-MM-DD), recordingNumber, county, state, grantorName, grantorType (individual/entity), granteeName, granteeType (individual/entity), propertyAddress, legalDescription, parcelNumber, acreage (number), lotNumber, blockNumber, subdivision, deedType (warranty/quitclaim/grant/sheriff/trustee), considerationAmount (number), transferTax (number), liensCount (number), liensDescription, easementsList (semicolon-separated easements), restrictionsList (semicolon-separated restrictions/covenants), encumbrancesList (semicolon-separated encumbrances), exceptionsList (semicolon-separated title exceptions), priorDocumentsList (semicolon-separated prior deeds/documents), notaryName, notaryExpiration, titleInsuranceRequired (true/false), cloudOnTitle (true/false), cloudDescription, riskScore (number 0-100), riskLevel (Low/Medium/High/Critical).

parameters.question: Analyze this title document in 5 sentences: 1) Overall title status (Clear/Clouded/At Risk), 2) Most critical defect or risk found, 3) Key lien or encumbrance that needs resolution, 4) Title insurability rating (Insurable/Requires Review/Not Insurable), 5) Single most important action before closing.

parameters.jsCode:
const allInputs = $input.all();
const data = (allInputs[0]?.json?.data || allInputs[0]?.json) || {};
const riskAnalysis = allInputs[1]?.json?.answer || allInputs[1]?.json?.markdown || '';
const fileName = $('New Title Document').item.json.name;
const fileId   = $('New Title Document').item.json.id;

const c = v => parseFloat(String(v||0).replace(/[^0-9.]/g,'')) || 0;
const exceptions = (data.exceptionsList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);
const liens      = (data.liensDescription || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);
const easements  = (data.easementsList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);

const riskScore = parseInt(data.riskScore) || 0;
const riskLevel = data.riskLevel ||
  (riskScore >= 70 ? 'High' : riskScore >= 40 ? 'Medium' : 'Low');

return [{ json: {
  documentType:       data.documentType       || 'N/A',
  recordingDate:      data.recordingDate      || 'N/A',
  recordingNumber:    data.recordingNumber    || 'N/A',
  county:             data.county             || 'N/A',
  state:              data.state              || 'N/A',
  grantorName:        data.grantorName        || 'N/A',
  granteeName:        data.granteeName        || 'N/A',
  propertyAddress:    data.propertyAddress    || 'N/A',
  parcelNumber:       data.parcelNumber       || 'N/A',
  deedType:           data.deedType           || 'N/A',
  considerationAmount: c(data.considerationAmount),
  liensCount:         parseInt(data.liensCount) || liens.length,
  liensDescription:   data.liensDescription   || 'None',
  easementsList:      data.easementsList      || 'None',
  exceptionsList:     data.exceptionsList     || 'None',
  exceptionsCount:    exceptions.length,
  cloudOnTitle:       data.cloudOnTitle       || false,
  cloudDescription:   data.cloudDescription   || 'None',
  riskScore, riskLevel, riskAnalysis,
  fileName, fileId,
  processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  fileId: fileId,
  grantorNames: data.grantorName || "N/A",
  granteeNames: data.granteeName || "N/A",
  recordingInfo: (data.recordingNumber || "N/A") + " | " + (data.county || "N/A") + ", " + (data.state || "N/A"),
  consideration: "$" + c(data.considerationAmount).toLocaleString(),
  lienCount: parseInt(data.liensCount) || liens.length,
  lienSummary: data.liensDescription || "None",
  easementCount: easements.length,
  easementSummary: data.easementsList || "None",
  encumbranceSummary: data.encumbrancesList || "None",
  riskLevel: riskLevel,
  riskAnalysis: riskAnalysis,
  criticalIssues: data.cloudDescription || "None",
  highIssues: "N/A",
  totalLienAmount: 0,
  insurability: data.cloudOnTitle ? "Requires Review" : "Insurable",
}}];
